outputs.title: Graduate futures data specification
outputs.description: Controlled specification for sources, fields, owners, caveats, suppression rules, update cycles, segmentation and responsible use.
acceptanceCriteria: Phase one sources, fields and owners are documented.
Caveats, suppression rules and update cycles are recorded.
Specification is complete enough for Power BI V1 build and validation.

outputs.title: Destination taxonomy and comparator framework
outputs.description: Framework for destination categories and meaningful comparator sets by subject, sector, Russell Group or other relevant peer group.
acceptanceCriteria: Destination categories are defined and tested against real examples.
Marginal and pathway-adjacent destinations are handled explicitly.
Comparator principles avoid crude internal ranking.

outputs.title: Power BI V1 dashboard
outputs.description: First dashboard iteration presenting programme, department and faculty-level graduate futures data.
acceptanceCriteria: Power BI V1 is built using the agreed phase one specification.
The dashboard can be tested with real programme or subject examples.
The dashboard includes caveats and responsible interpretation guidance.

outputs.title: Power BI V1 validation and UAT findings
outputs.description: Record of validation with selected faculty, programme and professional services users to inform V2.
acceptanceCriteria: Selected users have tested the dashboard and pack presentation.
Feedback covers clarity, usability, interpretability and actionability.
Findings are translated into a prioritised V2 improvement list.

outputs.title: V2 self-service programme packs
outputs.description: Packs that programme teams can access, understand and use informatively without a facilitated workshop first.
acceptanceCriteria: V2 packs reflect validation findings.
The packs separate data, interpretation prompts and caveats.
The packs can be used at programme, department or faculty level where data allows.

outputs.title: V2 dissemination and showcase plan
outputs.description: Plan for disseminating V2 packs and showcasing them in agreed institutional spaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Priority showcase spaces are agreed.
Programmes and faculties know where to access the packs.
Dissemination reinforces developmental use rather than ranking.

outputs.title: Faculty roundtable findings
outputs.description: Structured record of high-level faculty roundtables exploring initial observations, strengths, risks and questions.
acceptanceCriteria: Roundtables are held with agreed faculty audiences.
Findings are captured consistently.
Sensitive findings have a handling route.

outputs.title: Education Committee executive report
outputs.description: Executive report summarising initial findings from the graduate futures data deep dive.
acceptanceCriteria: The report distinguishes evidence, interpretation, caveats and action.
The report summarises faculty observations without over-claiming.
The report is submitted through the agreed route.

outputs.title: Programme workshop structure and materials
outputs.description: Workshop format, facilitator notes, interpretation guidance, action-plan template, Graduate Premium Profile template, Story Pack template and structured return form.
acceptanceCriteria: Materials guide teams from data interpretation to action and articulation.
Materials include caveats for comparators and marginal destinations.
Materials are ready to test with wayfinder programmes.

outputs.title: Wayfinder workshop validation findings
outputs.description: Validation findings from early programmes testing whether the packs, workshop structure and templates are usable and appropriately framed.
acceptanceCriteria: Wayfinder programmes complete a meaningful test.
Feedback identifies changes before priority rollout.
Findings distinguish data, pack, workshop and template issues.

outputs.title: Refined workshop model and priority rollout plan
outputs.description: Refined model and plan for priority rollout, including priority criteria, facilitator requirements, schedule and support model.
acceptanceCriteria: Wayfinder learning is reflected in the refined model.
Priority segment criteria are agreed and carefully framed.
Faculties understand their role in the priority wave.

outputs.title: Priority segment workshop outputs
outputs.description: Profiles, action plans, story material and structured returns from agreed priority programmes, departments, clusters or student-outcome segments.
acceptanceCriteria: Priority workshops are completed by September 2027.
Outputs include actions, owners, support needs and follow-up routes.
Priority learning is available for wider rollout.

outputs.title: Data refresh and BAU ownership model
outputs.description: Model for refreshing the data, maintaining Power BI, updating packs and connecting refreshed intelligence to planning cycles.
acceptanceCriteria: Refresh cadence and owners are confirmed.
Power BI maintenance and pack update routes are agreed.
Refreshed data has a route into planning.

outputs.title: Remaining institutional workshop rollout outputs
outputs.description: Workshop outputs from the remaining agreed coverage population beyond wayfinder and priority segments.
acceptanceCriteria: The model reaches the rest of the agreed coverage population.
Programmes or clusters produce agreed outputs where appropriate.
Faculty returns are complete enough for synthesis.

outputs.title: Institutional graduate futures typology and synthesis
outputs.description: Synthesis of destination patterns, strategy types, strengths, support needs, priority segment learning and infrastructure needs.
acceptanceCriteria: Faculty returns are synthesised into patterns and support needs.
Findings feed related King's Edge deliverables.
The synthesis distinguishes evidence, interpretation and recommended action.

measures.title: Data specification readiness
measures.questionAnswered: Has the data specification been completed in time for Power BI V1?
measures.measure: Completion of specification, inventory, caveat register, taxonomy and comparator framework.
measures.target: Data specification and analytical framework complete by September 2026.

measures.title: Power BI V1 validation
measures.questionAnswered: Has Power BI V1 been built and validated strongly enough to inform V2?
measures.measure: UAT findings covering clarity, relevance, interpretation, caveats and usefulness.
measures.target: Power BI V1 tested with selected users by September 2026.

measures.title: V2 pack dissemination and showcase
measures.questionAnswered: Have V2 packs been produced, disseminated and showcased?
measures.measure: Completion of V2 packs, dissemination plan and evidence of institutional access and visibility.
measures.target: V2 packs disseminated and showcased by Christmas 2026.

measures.title: Initial institutional reporting
measures.questionAnswered: Has the first data deep dive become faculty discussion and Education Committee reporting?
measures.measure: Faculty roundtables completed and executive report submitted.
measures.target: Faculty roundtables held and Education Committee report submitted by Christmas 2026.

measures.title: Workshop model validation
measures.questionAnswered: Have wayfinder programmes validated the workshop approach?
measures.measure: Wayfinder workshop completion and feedback on usability, credibility, framing, actionability and outputs.
measures.target: Wayfinder programmes complete meaningful tests by Christmas 2026.

measures.title: Responsible interpretation
measures.questionAnswered: Are users handling caveats, comparators and marginal destinations appropriately?
measures.measure: Use of caveat guidance, validation feedback, wayfinder feedback and review of returns.
measures.target: Caveat guidance is used consistently in packs and workshop materials.

measures.title: Priority segment rollout
measures.questionAnswered: Has the refined model reached agreed priority segments by September 2027?
measures.measure: Completed priority workshops, structured returns, profiles, action plans and story materials.
measures.target: Priority segment workshops completed by September 2027.

measures.title: Action orientation
measures.questionAnswered: Does the process lead to realistic actions with owners and support needs?
measures.measure: Quality and completeness of Graduate Futures Action Plans.
measures.target: Completed action plans for programmes included in each rollout wave.

measures.title: Data refresh and BAU integration
measures.questionAnswered: Has the product moved into a BAU refresh and maintenance model?
measures.measure: Confirmed refresh cadence, owner, Power BI maintenance route and pack update process.
measures.target: BAU ownership model confirmed before full rollout completes.

measures.title: Remaining rollout and synthesis
measures.questionAnswered: Has the workshop model reached remaining coverage and produced synthesis?
measures.measure: Completion of final rollout wave and synthesis into patterns, strengths and support needs.
measures.target: Remaining rollout and fuller synthesis completed during 2027/28.
